meta.title: Consolidation and Control: Power Shifts in Putin's Kremlin
meta.description: Hannah Thoburn, Brian Whitmore, and Angela Stent discuss the stability of Putin’s regime and its exercise of power at home and abroad. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
